prompt: Find a few good Hugging Face Spaces where I can generate images from text prompts. Prefer actively useful demos rather than tutorials about building one.
Recommend up to three Hugging Face Spaces that can turn a written prompt into a generated video. Include direct links and explain the main fit of each.
Find a Hugging Face Space that exposes an MCP server for executing Python code. Only recommend Spaces that are actually MCP-enabled.
I need an MCP-enabled Hugging Face Space that can extract or work with YouTube transcripts. Find the strongest matches and link them.

production_query: whisper speech to text transcription audio
prompt: Find MCP-enabled Hugging Face Spaces for transcribing speech or audio to text, ideally using Whisper or a comparable model.
Recommend Hugging Face Spaces that can turn an image into a 3D model or mesh. Give me up to three relevant live demos.
Find the official or most relevant Hugging Face Space for trying FLUX.1-schnell image generation.
Show me Hugging Face Spaces published by the user alexz-oai. Link the best matching repositories.
I'm looking for a hosted Hugging Face demo that generates images from natural-language descriptions. Can you point me to a few strong Spaces and say what makes each relevant?
Which Hugging Face Spaces are useful for creating video from a text description? Please recommend no more than three and include links.
I want to connect to a Hugging Face-hosted MCP tool that can run Python snippets. Find an MCP-capable Space for that purpose, without suggesting ordinary non-MCP demos.
Can you locate a Hugging Face MCP Space for retrieving YouTube video transcripts? Only list results with evidence that they expose MCP functionality.

prompt: Please find MCP-enabled Spaces on Hugging Face that provide audio transcription or speech-to-text, preferably Whisper-based.
I have a reference image and want an interactive Space that reconstructs a 3D asset from it. What Hugging Face demos should I try?
